name: semwitness
description: Proof-carrying semantic compression for AI-agent context, operated explicitly in shadow mode.

interface.shortDescription: Measure and verify semantic compression before using it.
interface.longDescription: SemWitness analyzes context, simulates deterministic compression, verifies proof bundles, and measures net token savings without claiming transparent prompt or response interception.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this context for safe token savings with SemWitness.
Simulate compression and verify the resulting proof bundle.
Replay this fixture and compare its measured token cost.
